title: rich aerated slovakian eggs quiche
description: a hearty, Slovakian-style breakfast quiche featuring free-range eggs and a crispy crust. perfect for a cozy morning meal.
instructions: roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch and place it in a 9-inch tart pan with a removable bottom.
in a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, milk, cheddar cheese, diced onion, diced ham (if using), salt, black pepper, and paprika.
pour the egg mixture into the prepared tart shell and smooth the top with a spatula.
bake the quiche for 35 minutes, or until the edges are golden brown and the center is set.
remove the quiche from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
serve warm, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
reheat the quiche in the oven or microwave as needed.
store leftover quiche in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days or freeze for up to 2 months.
